safety_flags: ENGINE_FALLBACK: screen required: all candidates disqualified before Chief selection
SCREEN_REQUIRED: all candidates disqualified before Chief selection
topology_op_labels: Pump A — Nucleophile feed, kept separate from acid chloride until mixer
Pump B — Electrophile feed, moisture-sensitive, must be kept dry and separate from air/O2
Pump C — Inline HCl scavenger base; can be premixed with Stream A or as separate feed for precise stoichiometry control
MFC D — Hydrogen introduced only at Stage 2 via mass flow controller; gas-liquid segmented flow for enhanced mass transfer
Packed Bed — Gas-liquid catalytic hydrogenation of alkene intermediate
MFC E — Oxidant introduced only at Stage 3 via mass flow controller; must not backflow to Stage 2 H2 zone
